episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 491: Collector Booster Collections For The Win
episode.description:
James and Cliff go over the hottest paper and digital cardboard this week, the latest metagame results, their cards to watch for the week and end up surprised at how hard older Collector Booster box prices have been surging.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
